calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. PAUL SILVER, Esq. for plaintiff/judgment creditor (via Zoom videoconference);
Defendant/judgment debtor WESLEY A. BUENCONSEJO in pro per.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting in part Wesley A. Buenconsejo's claim of exemption. (See signed order for complete ruling.) Copies of signed order mailed to the levying officer and to the parties. (302/RBU) *****

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Wesley A. Buenconsejo.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:06 a.m.

Roger Jackson, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
William Cooper, Collections Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Jackson and Cooper appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Wesley A. Buenconsejo.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on June 23, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Wesley A. Buenconsejo occurred on September 21, 2021, and was effectuated on October 2, 2021.
Default as to defendant Wesley A. Buenconsejo was entered on November 12, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 12, 2021.

Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Pre-Approval Letter to defendant dated May 18, 2000........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Credit Purchase Record.....................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Loan and Security Agreements and Disclosure Statement......................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Transaction Record.........................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, and against the defaulted defendant Wesley A. Buenconsejo, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,923.41.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,630.42.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $655.85.

Total - $39,209.68.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:20 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Continued To Jan-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
